name: Neiru Aonuma
description: A girl who has very distinct green eyes and pigtails. She is very quiet and still at most times, loves herself and makes no initiative to get to know people. On the contrary, she avoids contact with people. She confesses to [Ai](https://anilist.co/character/199892/Ai-Ohto) her goal, to save [her sister](https://anilist.co/character/260352), for whose death she feels responsible.
